texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: FROM THE PRINCIPAL'S DESK
texts.text: FROM THE PRINCIPAL'S DESK

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This  issue  of  newsletter  is  published with  snapshots  of  several  activities  performed during  October  to  December  2021.  Multiple academic and cultural activities are performed as  the  menace  of  covid-19  was  on  the  ebb.  I congratulate  the  editorial  board  as  they  have successfully brought out the newsletter in due time.  I  wish  the  newsletter  a  great  success  in its future journey.
texts.text: This  issue  of  newsletter  is  published with  snapshots  of  several  activities  performed during  October  to  December  2021.  Multiple academic and cultural activities are performed as  the  menace  of  covid-19  was  on  the  ebb.  I congratulate  the  editorial  board  as  they  have successfully brought out the newsletter in due time.  I  wish  the  newsletter  a  great  success  in its future journey.

texts.orig: 1.  Issues Handed over to Tripura State Higher Education Council and College Development Committee TU:
texts.text: 1.  Issues Handed over to Tripura State Higher Education Council and College Development Committee TU:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  current  issues  of  the  Newsletter  of  WP  have  been handed  over  to  Dr.  Alak  Bhattacharjee,  Director  CDC,  Tripura Central  University  on  01/10/2021  and  to  Prof.  Arunoday  Saha, Chairman, TSHEC on 08/10/2021.
texts.text: The  current  issues  of  the  Newsletter  of  WP  have  been handed  over  to  Dr.  Alak  Bhattacharjee,  Director  CDC,  Tripura Central  University  on  01/10/2021  and  to  Prof.  Arunoday  Saha, Chairman, TSHEC on 08/10/2021.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8.Visit of AICTE Margdarshak in WP:
texts.text: 8.Visit of AICTE Margdarshak in WP:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Dr.  Sandeep  Grover,  Margdarshak  of Women's  Polytechnic,  Hapania  and  TTAADC  Polytechnic  Institute for  NBA Accreditation appointed by AICTE, New Delhi had a visit to the institutes on 20-21 November, 2021 and had interactions with the faculty members providing several suggestions and recommendations for a successful NBA Accreditation.
texts.text: Dr.  Sandeep  Grover,  Margdarshak  of Women's  Polytechnic,  Hapania  and  TTAADC  Polytechnic  Institute for  NBA Accreditation appointed by AICTE, New Delhi had a visit to the institutes on 20-21 November, 2021 and had interactions with the faculty members providing several suggestions and recommendations for a successful NBA Accreditation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 9.  Students  of  MLT  Branch  participated  on  project work  (other  than  internship) at  Tripura  Medical College, Hapania:
texts.text: 9.  Students  of  MLT  Branch  participated  on  project work  (other  than  internship) at  Tripura  Medical College, Hapania:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  Students  of  MLT  Branch  undertook  a  special project work of taking Biometry in Psychiatry OPD at Tripura Medical College, Hapania.
texts.text: The  Students  of  MLT  Branch  undertook  a  special project work of taking Biometry in Psychiatry OPD at Tripura Medical College, Hapania.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 10. Visit of Directors on Proposed Girls Hostel:
texts.text: 10. Visit of Directors on Proposed Girls Hostel:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: On December 2021, the Director of Higher Education Sri N.C Sharma and the Director of OBC Welfare Smt. Kuntal Das Had a special visit to WP regarding allocation of land for setting  up  proposed  girls  hotel  in  the  campus  of  Women's Polytechnic,  Hapania.  The  2 nd issue  vol.  3  of  the  institute newsletter was officially uncovered by the Directors.
texts.text: On December 2021, the Director of Higher Education Sri N.C Sharma and the Director of OBC Welfare Smt. Kuntal Das Had a special visit to WP regarding allocation of land for setting  up  proposed  girls  hotel  in  the  campus  of  Women's Polytechnic,  Hapania.  The  2 nd issue  vol.  3  of  the  institute newsletter was officially uncovered by the Directors.

texts.orig: 11. Arm Forces day Collection by NSS volunteers:
texts.text: 11. Arm Forces day Collection by NSS volunteers:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  Volunteers  of  NSS  WP  Unit  collected  a  token amount from the faculty, staff and students of the institute on Arm Forces Day and contributed the amount of Rs.700/- to the state office.
texts.text: The  Volunteers  of  NSS  WP  Unit  collected  a  token amount from the faculty, staff and students of the institute on Arm Forces Day and contributed the amount of Rs.700/- to the state office.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 12. WP students won Prizes in quiz on AIDS :
texts.text: 12. WP students won Prizes in quiz on AIDS :

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  Students  groomed  under  Dr.  Surajit  Debnath, Deptt. of MLT, received awards at the quiz competition on AIDS, organised By Tripura State AIDS Control Society in December 2021.
texts.text: The  Students  groomed  under  Dr.  Surajit  Debnath, Deptt. of MLT, received awards at the quiz competition on AIDS, organised By Tripura State AIDS Control Society in December 2021.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 13.  Letter  from  the  Deputy  Speaker  regarding  establishing  Women's  Engineering  College  within  available infrastructure of WP:
texts.text: 13.  Letter  from  the  Deputy  Speaker  regarding  establishing  Women's  Engineering  College  within  available infrastructure of WP:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A letter was received by the office of the Principal, WP from the Directorate of Higher Education, Government of Tripura dated 30/12/2021 with a reference to the letter from  the Deputy Speaker, Tripura Legislative  Assembly, dated 15/12/2021 for consideration  of  issues  regarding  establishment  of  Women's  Engineering  College  within  available  infrastructure  of  WP. Accordingly,  a  committee  has  been  formed  in  this  regard  involving  eminent  and  experienced  faculty  members  of  different technical institutes of Tripura including WP, Hapania, TIT, Narsingarh and NIT Agartala.
texts.text: A letter was received by the office of the Principal, WP from the Directorate of Higher Education, Government of Tripura dated 30/12/2021 with a reference to the letter from  the Deputy Speaker, Tripura Legislative  Assembly, dated 15/12/2021 for consideration  of  issues  regarding  establishment  of  Women's  Engineering  College  within  available  infrastructure  of  WP. Accordingly,  a  committee  has  been  formed  in  this  regard  involving  eminent  and  experienced  faculty  members  of  different technical institutes of Tripura including WP, Hapania, TIT, Narsingarh and NIT Agartala.
